title: [WATF]Why Are They Fighting?
description:
Start epic mob battles in Minecraft! Duel Staff for 1v1, Team War Staff for group fights.
在Minecraft中开启史诗级生物对决！决斗法杖搞1v1，团战法杖搞群架。
body:
Ever wanted to see mobs duke it out? WATF lets you start epic battles between any mobs in Minecraft!
    ⚔️ Duel Staff — Right-click two mobs to start a 1v1 showdown. Watch them fight to the death!

    👥 Team War Staff — Pit entire species against each other in chaotic group battles! Zombies vs Skeletons? Piglin Brutes vs Piglin Brutes? Anything goes!

    🧠 Brain AI Support — Works with advanced AI mobs like Piglin Brutes that normally can't fight their own kind, thanks to deep Mixin integration.

    ✨ Features:
    • Two unique staff items with crafting recipes
    • Supports both Goal AI and Brain AI mobs
    • Same-species fighting
    • Full bilingual support (English & Chinese)
    • Works on Minecraft 1.21.1

    Perfect for creating mob arenas, testing combat mechanics, or just watching the chaos unfold!

    ⚠️ This mod was created with AI assistance.
    
是否曾想看到生物们一决高下？WATF 模组让你在 Minecraft 中发起任何生物间的史诗大战！

⚔️ 决斗法杖 — 右键点击两个生物即可展开 1v1 对决，看它们死战到底！

👥 团战法杖 — 让整个物种相互厮杀，展开混乱的群体大战！僵尸 vs 骷髅？猪灵蛮兵 vs 猪灵蛮兵？怎么乱来都行！

🧠 大脑 AI 支持 — 通过深度 Mixin 集成，兼容猪灵蛮兵等高级 AI 生物，让那些通常无法攻击同类的生物也能打起来。

✨ 特性：
 两种独特的法杖物品，自带合成配方
 同时支持目标 AI 和大脑 AI 生物
 同种生物对战
 完整双语支持（英语 & 中文）
 适用于 Minecraft 1.21.1

非常适合打造生物竞技场、测试战斗机制，或是纯粹欣赏混乱的场面！

⚠️ 本模组使用 AI 辅助创作。
